src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model package

Submodules

src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirAction module

src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirAction.register_action(*action_names, required_fields: list[str] = None)[source]

Decorator that registers a method as a handler for one or more IPC action names.

Parameters:

  • *action_names – One or more action name strings to bind to this handler.

  • required_fields – List of OsirIpcRequest fields that must be present and non-empty.

src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirExceptions module

class src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirExceptions.OsirException[source]

Bases: object

static CASE_NAME_REQUIRED() → OsirIpcResponse[source]

case_name is required for advanced handler creation.

static CASE_NOT_FOUND(case: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]
static CASE_REQUIRED() → OsirIpcResponse[source]

case_name is required when using profile or modules.

static FILES_OR_FOLDERS_REQUIRED() → OsirIpcResponse[source]

At least one of files_input or folders_input must be specified.

static FILE_NOT_FOUND(path: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]

File or directory not found.

static FILE_OPERATION_ERROR(error: str, operation: str = 'file operation') → OsirIpcResponse[source]

Error during file operations.

static IO_ERROR(error: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]

I/O error during file operations.

static MISSING_PARAMETER(parameter_name: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]
static MODULE_LOAD_ERROR(error: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]
static MODULE_NOT_FOUND(module: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]
static MODULE_REQUIRED_FOR_FILES() → OsirIpcResponse[source]

files_module is required when processing files_input.

static MODULE_REQUIRED_FOR_FOLDERS() → OsirIpcResponse[source]

Either folders_modules or files_in_folder_modules is required when processing folders_input.

static MODULE_VALIDATION_ERROR(error: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]
static PROFILE_OR_MODULE_REQUIRED() → OsirIpcResponse[source]

At least one of profile or modules must be specified.

static PROFILE_REQUIRED_FOR_MODULE_OPERATIONS() → OsirIpcResponse[source]

modules_to_add or modules_to_remove can only be used when a profile is specified.

static UNEXPECTED_ERROR(error: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]
static UNKNOWN_ACTION(action: str) → OsirIpcResponse[source]

Generic validation error.

src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirIpcRequest module

class src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirIpcRequest.OsirIpcRequest(*, action: str, params: dict | None = None)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Standard data model for IPC requests within the OSIR service.

action

The command to execute (e.g., ‘exec_module’, ‘create_case’, ‘get_task_log’).

Type:

str

params

Dictionary containing all parameters for the action.

Type:

dict, optional

action: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

params: dict | None

src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirIpcResponse module

class src.osir_service.osir_service.ipc.model.OsirIpcResponse.OsirIpcResponse(*, version: float = 1.0, status: int | None = 200, message: str | None = None, response: Dict[str, Any] | List[Any] | None = {})[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Standardized response envelope returned by the OSIR Master service.

version

The current version of the OSIR framework for compatibility checks.

Type:

float

status

The HTTP-style status code (e.g., 200 for success, 400+ for errors).

Type:

int

message

A descriptive summary of the operation result.

Type:

str, optional

response

A container for the actual data payload (e.g., log traces, handler IDs, or case metadata).

Type:

dict, optional

message: str | None
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

response: Dict[str, Any] | List[Any] | None
status: int | None
version: float
